evidence: The paper employs random forest regression (ranger package) with variable importance plots (vip package) explicitly for covariate selection: "The most highly predictive set of covariates from this process was entered into the regression modelling equations." The six variable importance tables (S6-S11) are presented but never interpreted. All causal conclusions derive from inverse probability weighted panel regression, geospatial regression, and E-values (sensitivity analysis), not from impurity importance magnitude or ranking.
